trust.notes: Bootstrapped from `README.md`, `.github/CODEOWNERS`, and `SECURITY.md`. Maintainer information was imported from broad CODEOWNERS patterns; `owners.team` prefers `@tauri-apps/wg-tauri` from the repo-wide rule, and `owners.maintainers` preserves narrower owner candidates. SECURITY.md provided a policy or reporting URL rather than a direct mailbox, so `security_contact` preserves that URL. Left `repo.build` unset because `Cargo.toml` and `package.json` suggested conflicting build commands. Left `repo.test` unset because `Cargo.toml` and `package.json` suggested conflicting test commands. This is an overlay bootstrap, not a maintainer-controlled canonical record. Preserved prior verified status: no previously present field regressed in this refresh.
